blueprints.title: Grade 3 Mathematics Baseline Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Samples approved items across all 16 CAPS topics in grade3_mathematics_en to establish a starting mastery profile.

blueprints.title: Numbers, operations and relationships Topic Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Diagnostic covering CAPS 3.M.1.1 with balanced difficulty and misconception coverage.

blueprints.title: Numbers, operations and relationships Short Practice
blueprints.description: Short practice quiz after the standard lesson variant.

blueprints.title: Numbers, operations and relationships Recheck
blueprints.description: Targets previously missed misconceptions with on-level and challenging items.

blueprints.title: Numbers, operations and relationships Mastery Check
blueprints.description: End-of-topic check emphasising on-level and challenging application items.
